footer.tagline: The Hub for Every Pet Life

home.heroTitle2: Pet Life, All in One Place
home.heroSubtitle: Find quality farms, book clinics, shop pet stores, and care for your pets — all in one place, free forever.
home.farmDesc: Whiskora lists only verified farms — not just listings, but farms that genuinely care for their animals with proper standards.
home.farmCriteria1Desc: Every farm must verify their documents and physical address. Anonymous or unverifiable farms are not accepted.
home.farmCriteria2Desc: Farms must record health history, vaccinations, and disease screenings for each animal through the Whiskora system.
home.farmCriteria3Desc: Bloodlines are traceable to grandparent generation, certified by CFA / TICA or recognized breeder associations.
home.farmCriteria4Desc: Housing must be clean, well-ventilated, uncrowded, and animals must receive species-appropriate socialization.
home.farmCriteria5Desc: Top-rated farms must have clear after-purchase policies, accessible contact channels, and respond to buyer reviews.
home.farmCriteria6Desc: Ratings are calculated from verified buyer reviews only. No paid reviews. Farms below threshold are temporarily suspended.
home.marketDesc: Buy and sell pets from verified sellers with guarantees and full breed documentation.
home.serviceDesc: Book vet appointments, pet boarding, grooming, training, and more — with genuine user reviews.
home.idCardDesc: Create a beautiful digital ID with QR code, health history, breed info, and your pet's name — shareable on any social platform.
home.knowledgeDesc: Articles on nutrition, health, behavior, and genetics for cats, dogs, and exotic pets.
home.toolsDesc: Calculate human-equivalent age, due dates, daily calories, and breed-standard weight.
home.step1Desc: Create an account with email or Google in under 1 minute. No credit card required.
home.step2Desc: Add your pets' info, photos, vaccinations, and health history.
home.step3Desc: Search for farms, clinics, or services near you with GPS.
home.memberTitle: Sign Up Free — What Do You Get?
home.memberSubtitle: Your Whiskora account is free for life. No monthly fees, no credit card needed.
home.member1Desc: Save your pets' names, breeds, birthdays, photos, and basic info — organized in one place.
home.member2Desc: Create a digital ID card with QR code to share your pet's profile and history anytime, anywhere.
home.member3Desc: Log vaccine history, health checks, weight, and daily health notes — with reminders when vaccines are due.
home.member4Desc: Record food, vet, grooming, and other costs. View monthly and yearly summaries in the Finance page.
home.member5Desc: Build and view your pet's multi-generation bloodline. Ideal for breeders and farm buyers.
home.member6Desc: Upload and store breed certificates, disease test results, vaccine records, and important documents in the Cloud.
home.partnerSubtitle: Whether you run a farm, shop, or clinic — we help your business grow faster.
home.partner1Desc: Our users are pet lovers ready to buy. No need to find customers yourself — we bring them to you.
home.partner2Desc: Dashboard to manage your farm, shop, or service — stock, booking queue, and documents in one place.
home.partner3Desc: First-wave partners pay zero commission, zero registration fees, and zero monthly fees throughout the program.
home.partner4Desc: Receive a 'Verified' badge on your profile to boost credibility and increase customer selection rates.
home.partner5Desc: High-rated farms and shops get featured on the homepage and appear at the top of search results.
home.partner6Desc: Our team helps you set up, answers questions, and guides you so your business launches quickly.
home.communityDesc: Share experiences, ask for advice, and connect with fellow pet owners in our online community.
home.partnerCtaDesc: Open your farm, shop, or clinic — reach thousands of customers, free during Genesis Program.

login.subtitle: Sign in to care for your beloved pets
login.emailToggle: Signed up with email? Log in here

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Free forever. No credit card needed.
register.successDesc: We've sent a confirmation link to your email. Please check your inbox (including the Spam folder).

about.title: About Whiskora
about.subtitle: About Us
about.heroTagline:
The digital platform for pet lovers
Connect, care for, and manage your pets in one place
about.featuresTitle: What You Can Do on Whiskora
about.mission1Desc: Whiskora was born from the belief that every pet deserves the best care. We build tools that help owners manage their pets systematically and with data-backed decisions.
about.mission2Desc: A central hub where professional breeders, farms, and general pet owners can connect, share information, and find their ideal pet with transparency.
about.mission3Desc: Our identity verification and traceable pet history system ensures every transaction and adoption is built on accurate, trustworthy data.
about.mission4Desc: We compile expert knowledge on pet health, nutrition, and behavior so every owner can make informed decisions.
about.founderNote: Whiskora was built out of love for animals. We believe every cat, dog, and pet deserves the best possible care. So we built tools that make caring for pets easy, fun, and organized. Whether you're a new pet owner or an experienced breeder, Whiskora is always ready to be your trusted companion.
about.feat1Desc: Create digital profiles for each pet with health history and vaccines.
about.feat2Desc: Create a farm page and manage breeding litters professionally.
about.feat3Desc: A digital card with QR code that others can scan to view your pet's info instantly.
about.feat4Desc: Articles and knowledge for owners of all pet types.
about.feat5Desc: Calculators and decision tools for owners: food, vaccines, breeding, and more.
about.feat6Desc: Track pet expenses and view monthly and yearly summaries easily.

partner.guestSubtitle: Reach thousands of customers — free during Genesis Program
partner.loginRequired: Sign in to open your business
